name: Chuck au
description: Appearance: Chuck has tanned skin, thin eyebrows, and spiky hair with brown, blond and darker highlights and sideburns. He wears an orange tropical shirt with brown buttons and light orange, dark orange, and cream-colored floral accents, a puka shell necklace and bracelets, silver earrings, dark sunglasses raised to his forehead, blue pants held by a brown belt, and stitched moccasins with orange laces
creator: Desiree M
